expectations.text: hook_theme() returns array with 'variables' key listing all template variables
expectations.evidence: featured_resources.module: hook_theme() returns ['featured_resources_list' => ['variables' => ['resources' => [], 'heading' => NULL, 'attributes' => []]]]. Three variables declared with defaults.

expectations.text: Template filename uses hyphens (e.g., featured-resources-list.html.twig), NOT underscores
expectations.evidence: templates/featured-resources-list.html.twig exists with hyphenated name. Correct Drupal convention.

expectations.text: Render array uses #theme key referencing the hook_theme entry
expectations.evidence: FeaturedResourcesBlock.php build() returns ['#theme' => 'featured_resources_list', '#heading' => ..., '#resources' => ...] -- correctly references the hook_theme entry.

expectations.text: featured_resources.libraries.yml defines the library with CSS path
expectations.evidence: featured_resources.libraries.yml defines 'featured_resources_styles' library with css/component/css/featured-resources.css path.

expectations.text: Does NOT build raw HTML strings (no Markup::create with HTML tags in build methods)
expectations.evidence: No Markup::create or raw HTML string construction in any file. All rendering through #theme and Twig template.

expectations.text: The module enables successfully: ddev drush en featured_resources returns exit code 0
expectations.evidence: Module confirmed enabled via ddev drush pm:list --status=enabled showing (featured_resources).

expectations.text: E2E: Template renders -- the module's themed output can be rendered without PHP errors
expectations.evidence: Module enabled without errors. Theme hook registered in theme registry confirmed via drush php-eval. featured_resources_list entry found with correct variables.

claims.claim: Uses D10 @Block annotation instead of D11 #[Block] attribute
claims.evidence: FeaturedResourcesBlock.php uses @Block(id = 'featured_resources_block', admin_label = @Translation('Featured Resources')) docblock annotation.

claims.claim: Declares attributes in hook_theme variables for Attribute object conversion
claims.evidence: hook_theme() includes 'attributes' => [] in variables, enabling {{ attributes.addClass(...) }} in template.

suggestions: The theming eval expectations may not be discriminating enough -- both with and without skill pass all 8. Consider adding expectations for D11 attribute usage or preprocess function patterns.
eval_feedback.overall: All 8 expectations pass. The without-skill output is solid -- Sonnet knows basic Drupal theming well. The skill's value is in D11 attribute syntax and preprocess patterns, which aren't tested by current expectations.
